title: salix × aellenii
intro: Salix × aellenii, also known as Aellen's willow, is a hybrid plant species in the genus Salix, derived from the cross between Salix × purpurea and Salix × sepulcralis. The plant is rich in salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable resource for medicinal uses. The medicinal properties of Salix × aellenii have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including pain relief, fever reduction, and inflammation. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, offering a natural remedy for promoting overall health and well-being.
